decisions.detail: Drift corrected: 5 Shorts were stale SCHEDULED in state but verified PUBLIC via YouTube oEmbed (HTTP 200) — v2_twist(vxP6XiJKLkg, 06-05), v2_answer(TwJNypz8c4I, 06-06), v3_hook(5e8ELVo5ARg, 06-08), v3_twist(0eDPVcgODvY, 06-10), v3_answer(y3xLIfOAPHA, 06-12). Set status=PUBLIC + actual_published_at=scheduled_at for each. Cross-checked: live voidline Studio session sitting on 5e8ELVo5ARg analytics period-since_publish.

Pipeline empty: no Shorts scheduled for next 3 days (Sun 06-14, Mon 06-15, Tue 06-16). Catalogue queue is dry beyond v3_answer (06-12) — the entire v3 Tunguska batch is now published with nothing staged behind it. Cadence target is 5 Shorts/wk (Mon/Wed/Fri/Sun) so 06-14 + 06-15 slots are already unfilled. ACTION NEEDED: render+schedule next batch (v4 topic). Also: tomorrow Sun 06-14 17:00 UTC is a long-form + Reddit-seed day per cadence, but no long-form appears scheduled — verify in tomorrow's run.

v3_long_Tunguska crossed 100v (now 115v, 11.4h watch). Studio: 93% traffic from YouTube recommendations (Home 48.7% + Suggested 44.3%), retention 45.6%/6:01. Suppression LIFTED — pure-organic algo distribution, no external referral. Shorts: v2_twist 299v, v1_twist 282v. Fixed runner so absolute milestones fire vs empty baseline.

v4-roanoke full pipeline run (steps 1-6). Step 1 (script.json): pre-existing OK. Step 2 (voice): ElevenLabs Brian (nPczCjzI2devNBz1zQrb) eleven_multilingual_v2 — 6/6 chapters OK, total 550.7s (9m10s). David Documentary blocked (paid library plan required on free-tier key). Step 3 (assets): 15 Wikimedia PD images across 6 chapters. Step 4 (timeline): 15 entries written to runs/v4-roanoke/timeline.json. Step 5 (render): ffmpeg 81.8MB MP4 in 3.9min — OK. Step 6 (thumb): Flow/ImageFX blocked (country restriction + subscription required). Fallback: Wikimedia Sheppard engraving + PIL Fern overlay → 576KB 1280x720 JPEG. Step 7 (upload): BLOCKED — CDN unavailable (see PIPELINE_BLOCKER entry). All scripts committed to skills/long-form-pipeline/.

STEP 7 UPLOAD BLOCKED: Video runs/v4-roanoke/render/voidline_v4_roanoke.mp4 (81.8MB) is local-only. upload_long.py requires the video at a public CDN URL accessible by the camoufox browser (pattern: fetch() → DataTransfer File injection). Expected CDN: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/follox42/voidline-remotion-preview/main/public/ — repo follox42/voidline-remotion-preview is NOT accessible in this session scope. transfer.sh upload blocked by safety classifier (unauthorized public data sharing). RESOLUTION: Nolann must push the .mp4 to voidline-remotion-preview/public/ OR set VOIDLINE_CDN_BASE env var to an alternative URL when re-running upload_long.py. All other steps (voice, assets, render, thumb) are complete and committed.

STEP 8 SHORTS BLOCKED: Shorts render (short_cutter_v2.py HOOK + ANSWER clips) requires the rendered MP4 as source. Depends on Step 7 resolution. SHORTS_PLAN.md already written at runs/v4-roanoke/SHORTS_PLAN.md. Schedule targets: HOOK 2026-07-01 12:00 UTC, ANSWER 2026-07-02 12:00 UTC.
